title: BetterSulfurCubes
description: BetterSulfurCubes takes the Sulfur Cube to another level! Sulfur Cubes can now swallow almost any block and fully assume its behavior — turning these bouncy little creatures into some of the most useful mobs in the game.
body: **Better Sulfur Cubes** takes the Sulfur Cube to another level! Sulfur Cubes can now swallow almost any block and fully assume its behavior — turning these bouncy little creatures into some of the most useful mobs in the game. --- ## Swallowable Blocks ### Redstone Block A Redstone Cube is a living, bouncing signal source — full strength in all directions. Hit it, slide it, or leash it into position. Build circuits that actually move. ### TNT Light it up with flint & steel, a fire charge, arrows, fire, or redstone — and four seconds later it goes off. Keep it far from your base, or lean into the chaos and launch it at your enemies like an explosive cannonball. ### Any Light-Emitting Block Torches, lanterns, glowstone, sea lanterns, shroomlights — any light-emitting block turns the cube into a roaming light source. Leash it and drag it wherever you need light. Furnace-type cubes even glow brighter when they start smelting! ### Chest & Barrel Right-click to open a 27-slot inventory you can leash and drag around with you. Hoppers push and pull from it too. Pick it up in a bucket and you have essentially a Shulker Box — before you even reach the End. Shear it to pop the chest out along with everything inside. ### Crafting Table Right-click to open a full crafting grid, anywhere, anytime. ### Furnace, Blast Furnace & Smoker A fully functional furnace on the move. Load it up, leash it, and smelt while you explore. Pick it up in a bucket mid-smelt and put it back down somewhere else — it picks right back up where it left off. --- ## Cosmetics ### Dye Coloring Right-click any cube that has swallowed a block with a **dye** to splash it with color. All 16 dyes are supported. Use a water bucket to wash it off. ### Invisible Shell Right-click with a **Phantom Membrane** to dissolve the outer shell entirely — leaving only the swallowed block visible inside. Creepy, cool, or both. Water bucket restores the shell. --- ## Potent Sulfur Cubes Feed a Sulfur Cube **Potent Sulfur** to turn it into a **Potent Sulfur Cube**. Keep feeding it — up to four times — and watch it grow into something massive and useful: | Potent Sulfur fed | Size | |---|---| | 1 | 3×3×3 | | 2 | 5×5×5 | | 3 | 7×7×7 | | 4 | 9×9×9 | A Potent Sulfur Cube is stationary and players walk straight through the shell. Step inside and you have open space to build freely — a hidden home, a secret farm, a redstone contraption, whatever you can dream up. Pick it up with an **empty bucket** and everything inside is saved into it. The cube and your entire build become a single item you can carry in your inventory and place anywhere in the world. Shear the Potent Sulfur Cube to burst it open and set your build free! --- ## Feedback & Suggestions Have a bug to report, a feature idea, or just want to share what you've built with a Potent Sulfur Cube? I'd love to hear it! Drop a comment, open an issue, or reach out — every bit of feedback helps shape where this mod goes next. --- ## Requirements - Minecraft 26.2-snapshot-2 - Fabric Loader 0.18.6 - Fabric API 0.145.5+26.2 --- ## Disclaimer This mod is built on **26.2-snapshot-2**, a pre-release version of Minecraft. It is developed ahead of the full **Chaos Cubed** drop, which means things may break when the release arrives. That said, the release may also bring new possibilities — so expect updates, and possibly new features, once it lands.
